scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "cd server && node index.js" "cd client && npm run dev"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.postinstall: cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.reset-db: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p='server/database/health_assistant.db';if(fs.existsSync(p)){fs.unlinkSync(p);console.log('Database reset. Restart to re-seed.')}else{console.log('No DB found')}"
scripts.clean: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const r=d=>{if(fs.existsSync(d))fs.rmSync(d,{recursive:true,force:true})};r('node_modules');r('server/node_modules');r('client/node_modules');r('server/database/health_assistant.db');console.log('Cleaned. Run npm install to reinstall.')"
scripts.update: npm install && cd server && npm update && cd ../client && npm update && echo Update complete!
